gist.headline: SentIQGPT enters the chat
gist.blurb: SentIQGPT just sprouted in our community greenhouse! It's a slick browser-based AI assistant packed with chat memory, file analysis, and image generation.
gist.summary: Added SentIQGPT, a new browser-based AI assistant with chat memory and file analysis, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore SentIQGPT's advanced chat and image generation features directly from our community directory.
gist.visual_concept: SentIQGPT implies intelligence and chat capabilities. The scene should feature a greenhouse (referencing GREENHOUSE.md) where smart chat features are growing. Polly the bee will be wearing reading glasses (IQ/smart theme) and watering a plant that grows chat bubbles.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a lush greenhouse where a smart AI assistant is growing. The main character is a cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body and dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular blush marks on cheeks, a small happy smile, and small rounded light blue translucent wings. She is wearing tiny reading glasses and watering a glowing digital plant that sprouts colorful chat bubbles. A chunky retro monitor nearby displays a friendly interface. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
